US: US1: As a coach I should be able to see the Saved Responses button in Inbox if the workspace subscription is a Paid plan (from Pro) or Trial Plan
AC: AC1: Workspace is in Trial or Paid plans
Step:
1. Set workspace to Trial plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Title: Trial plan
Expectation:
- SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use Saved Responses feature
- SHOULD show enabled button in inbox chat
- SHOULD allow user to save and use saved message as current behavior

Title: Pro plan
Expectation:
- Pro plan - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use Saved Responses feature
- Pro plan - SHOULD show enabled button in inbox chat
- Pro plan - SHOULD allow user to save and use saved message as current behavior

Title: Studio plan
Expectation:
- Studio plan - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use Saved Responses feature
- Studio plan - SHOULD show enabled button in inbox chat
- Studio plan - SHOULD allow user to save and use saved message as current behavior

Title: Bundle plan
Expectation:
- Bundle plan - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use Saved Responses feature
- Bundle plan - SHOULD show enabled button in inbox chat
- Bundle plan - SHOULD allow user to save and use saved message as current behavior

AC: AC2: Workspace is in Free Plan
Step:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Title: Free plan - disabled button
Expectation: - SHOULD disable Saved Responses button with icon for upgrade

Title: Free plan - hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD change button state and display tooltip "Upgrade to use Save Response feature" when hovering on the icon

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Owner
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click Saved Responses button
Priority: - SHOULD navigate to billing page focused on Pro plan

Title: Free plan - Trainer click
Expectation:
- SHOULD show pop-up informing trainer to reach out to workspace owner for upgrade
- SHOULD display owner's name in pop-up (same pop-up as broadcast feature)
- SHOULD close pop-up when clicking x

AC: AC3: Update Billing Page with Saved Responses option
Title: Billing page - Saved Responses in Compare section
Expectation:
- SHOULD add Saved Responses option in Pro and Studio plan in Compare section
- SHOULD highlight Saved Responses in Pro plan
- SHOULD NOT highlight Saved Responses in Studio plan
- SHOULD display title as Saved Responses

Priority: - SHOULD show tooltip "Save and reuse message templates to respond to client inquiries instantly from your Inbox." when hovering on Saved Responses option
- SHOULD NOT add Saved Responses option in billing modal for Bundle plan

Step:
1. Set workspace to Pro plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Start using Saved Responses function
4. Admin/Owner downgrades workspace to Free plan
Title: Pro plan downgrade
Expectation:
- SHOULD block Saved Responses function
- SHOULD request trainer to log out by showing pop-up (same UC as broadcast downgrade)

Priority:
- Studio plan downgrade - SHOULD block Saved Responses function
- Studio plan downgrade - SHOULD request trainer to log out by showing pop-up (same UC as broadcast downgrade)
